value.body:
## Summary

Upgrade `vitest` from 4.1.8 to 4.1.9 across all workspace packages that declare it.

## Affected manifests

- `packages/agents/package.json`
- `packages/api/package.json`
- `packages/cli/package.json`
- `packages/codex-app-server/package.json`
- `packages/database/package.json`
- `packages/desktop/package.json`
- `packages/git/package.json`
- `packages/git-db/package.json`
- `packages/logging/package.json`
- `packages/ui/package.json`
- `packages/usecases/package.json`

## Rationale

`pnpm outdated --recursive --format json` reports a patch release for the shared test runner. Upgrade all declarations together to avoid mixed test-runner versions in the monorepo.

## Verification

- Run affected package tests, or the workspace test command if one is added.
- Run `pnpm typecheck`.
- Run `pnpm check`.
value.title: Upgrade Vitest to 4.1.9 across workspace
